writeup: The Buffalo Bills entered May 2026 riding the momentum of a busy draft weekend in Pittsburgh, with fans and analysts eagerly dissecting every selection. Post-draft coverage dominated the Bills news cycle, as beat writers and analytics outlets broke down how new additions could fit into Sean McDermott's roster. Undrafted free agent signings added further intrigue, with the Bills looking to uncover hidden gems as they have in previous years. With Rookie Minicamp just days away on May 8-9, the focus was quickly shifting toward getting new talent on the field for the first time.
